prompt: Playwright 테스트가 실패하고 있어. 디버깅하고 고쳐줘
assertions: Runs test_run to execute the full test suite and identify failures
Uses test_debug to pause at each failing test's failure point
Investigates failures using at least 2 browser tools (snapshot, console_messages, network_requests, evaluate)
Identifies and states the root cause category (selector drift, timing race, stale assertion, or other)
Modifies the test code to fix the identified issue
Runs test_run again after fixing to verify the test passes
